name: dostai-root
description: BuddyClaw Backend: Microservices-based AI companion ecosystem built on OpenClaw.

scripts.build: echo 'Root build not required. Use Blueprint to deploy individual services.'
scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix anime-service && npm install --prefix celeb-service && npm install --prefix liam-service && npm install --prefix mindreset-service && npm install --prefix openclaw-service && npm install --prefix safespace-service && npm install --prefix sarvam-proxy && npm install --prefix ziva-service && npm install --prefix web
